summary: Mom Experience Frontend Testing Complete - 7/8 features verified working. Key Actions (renamed from Quick Actions) now shows only Timeline and Wellness cards. Bottom nav correctly hides Timeline and Wellness tabs. Marketplace video play and provider photos working. Birth Setting icon updated. Date picker could not be fully tested due to no team providers in demo account.

issues: Provider avatars use DiceBear lorelei style (line-art) which may not be immediately recognizable as photos - consider using a different avatar style like 'avataaars' for more distinct profile pictures

critical_code_review_comments: home.tsx: 'Key Actions' section correctly shows only Timeline and Wellness cards (lines 177-205)
_layout.tsx: Timeline and Wellness tabs correctly hidden with href:null (lines 48-56)
marketplace.tsx: Video play handler uses Platform.OS check - window.open for web, Linking for native (lines 568-576)
marketplace.tsx: Picture priority correctly prefers profile.picture over user.picture (line 79)
appointments.tsx: Web date picker modal implemented with native HTML input type='date' (lines 514-573)
profile.tsx: Birth Setting uses add-circle-outline icon (line 463)
my-team.tsx: Pending providers section shows when pendingProviders.length > 0 (lines 181-229)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mom experience features tested: 1) Key Actions renamed and reduced to Timeline/Wellness only - WORKING. 2) Bottom nav hides Timeline/Wellness - WORKING. 3) Marketplace video play - WORKING (opens YouTube). 4) Provider photos - WORKING (DiceBear avatars loading). 5) Date picker - CODE VERIFIED but cannot UI test without team providers. 6) Birth Setting icon - WORKING. 7) My Team pending section - structure exists but no pending requests in demo data. Metro cache had old code - cleared cache to see changes.

key_actions_rename.details: Section title changed from 'Quick Actions' to 'Key Actions'

key_actions_reduced.details: Only Timeline and Wellness cards shown in Key Actions (Birth Plan, Find Providers, Appointments, My Team removed)

bottom_nav_hidden_tabs.details: Timeline and Wellness NOT visible in bottom navigation. Visible tabs: Home, Birth Plan, My Team, Messages, Profile

marketplace_video_play.details: Video thumbnail shows with play-circle overlay. Click opens YouTube URL

marketplace_provider_photo.details: Provider photos load correctly - Sarah Mitchell has DiceBear avatar. Code prefers profile.picture over user.picture

birth_setting_icon.details: Profile page shows Birth Setting with add-circle-outline icon

appointments_date_picker.details: Web date picker modal implemented with HTML input type='date'. Could not UI test as demo mom has no team providers to create appointments with

my_team_pending_section.details: Pending Invitations section exists in code and will display when pendingProviders.length > 0. Demo account has no pending requests so section is correctly hidden

notes: Metro cache was holding old code version - needed to clear /app/frontend/.metro-cache and restart expo to see changes
Date picker testing requires team providers - the 'Request Appointment' CTA and modal only show when providers.length > 0
DiceBear 'lorelei' avatar style generates line-art faces - images ARE loading correctly
